---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# Vector { #json2vec.Vector }

```python
Vector()
```

Fixed-width numeric vector tensorfield request.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.Vector.type) |  |
| [n_dim](#json2vec.Vector.n_dim) |  |
| [objective](#json2vec.Vector.objective) |  |
